{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Subspace torpedoes
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Subspace torpedoes]] were used to impact a star.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
